name: JCole Golf Academy
about: JCole Golf Academy is an indoor golf training facility specializing in instruction and practice. The academy uses advanced 3D technology for swing diagnosis and offers weatherproof training sessions that never get canceled due to weather. It provides various coaching options including memberships, private lessons, and online coaching programs, catering to golfers looking to improve their skills in a controlled environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Weatherproof training that never gets canceled
Comprehensive coaching programs for all skill levels
Access to advanced simulation technology for realistic practice

food_and_drink.notes: Allowed for events and private functions

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned as 'X-Golf' technology for the best indoor golf experience

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: New student assessment form is available for download, suggesting they may provide clubs or require you to bring your own. Contact the academy for specific requirements.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The website mentions 'Escape the heat with indoor Golf' and 'Never canceled' but doesn't specify BYOB policy. Contact them for confirmation.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify time frames for 18 holes. Contact JCole Golf Academy for more details on typical session lengths.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the academy offers junior/youth programs and mentions 'Never canceled' training which would benefit young golfers avoiding weather interruptions.
